title: Monali Thakur Releases Triple-Track EP 'Butterflies' Exploring Diverse Love Themes
description: Monali Thakur has launched her triple-track EP 'Butterflies' featuring the songs 'Nai Milna Ve', 'Piya/I Wanna', and 'Butterflies', delving into various aspects of love. The singer expresses her creative freedom and excitement about this new musical direction. Discover more about her latest work and passion for music in this article.
